title: Electoral Process (Amendment) Act, 2021

sections.title: This Act may be cited as the Electoral Process Short title
sections.body:
(Amendment) Act, 2021, and shall be read as one with the Electoral
Process Act, 2016, in this Act referred to as the principal Act. Act No. 35
of 2016
2. Section 2 of the principal Act is amended by the insertion of Amendment
the following new definitions in the appropriate places in alphabetical of section 2
order:
“ correctional centre” has the meaning assigned to the words
in the Zambia Correctional Service Act, 2021; Act No. 37
of 2021
“correctional officer” has the meaning assigned to the words
in the Zambia Correctional Service Act, 2021; Act No. 37
of 2021
“inmate” has the meaning assigned to the word in the Zambia Act No. 37
Correctional Service Act, 2021; of 2021
“legally disqualified” means the absence of legal capacity as
provided in section 4 of the Mental Health Act; Act No. 6 of
2019
“officer-in-charge” has the meaning assigned to the word in
the Zambia Correctional Service Act, 2021; Act No. 37
of 2021
“prison” has the meaning assigned to the word in the Zambia Act No. 37
Correctional Service Act, 2021;; and of 2021
“State institution” has the meaning assigned to the words in
the Constitution;. Cap. 1
3. The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section 9 and Repeal and
replacement
the substitution therefor of the following:
of section 9
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K8.00 each.

sections.title: Section 89(1) of the principal Act is amended by the Amendment
sections.body:
insertion of the following new paragraph immediately after of section 89
paragraph (n):
(o) without lawful authority announce and declare the results
of an election.
8. Section 125(2) of the principal Act is amended by the — Amendment
of section
(a) insertion of the following new paragraph immediately after 125
paragraph (w):
(x) the electoral processes at prisons and correctional
centres; and
(b) renumbering of paragraph (x) as paragraph (y).
